title: Smoked Lazy Sunday Argentinian Haddock Bake
description: A light and citrusy Argentinian-inspired dish featuring smoked haddock, perfect for a lazy Sunday brunch. Serve with crusty bread or over rice.
instructions: Rinse the smoked haddock fillets and pat them dry with paper towels.
In a large clay pot, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and sauté until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the white wine and cook until the liquid is almost completely reduced, about 2 minutes.
Add the lemon juice and continue to cook for another minute.
Add the smoked haddock fillets, salt, and black pepper to the clay pot and stir to coat with the lemon sauce.
Transfer the clay pot to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until the haddock is cooked through and flakes easily with a fork.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and a sprinkle of grated lemon zest.
Serve immediately, with crusty bread or over rice if desired.
